title: Enterprise Data Architect/ Uzņēmuma datu arhitekts in Product Development & Technology | SEB, Riga

summary.lv: SEB meklē uzņēmuma datu arhitektu (Product Development & Technology), kas definēs un uzturēs uzņēmuma datu arhitektūras principus, datu modeļus un mākoņa risinājumus.
summary.en: SEB is hiring an Enterprise Data Architect (Product Development & Technology) to define and maintain enterprise data architecture principles, data models and cloud-based solutions.
